channel.title: GymLedger
channel.description: Honest reviews of dumbbells, barbells, power racks, benches, kettlebells, and cardio machines. We tell you exactly what to buy at $500, $2,000, and $5,000 budgets — and what to skip regardless of budg

item.title: Cardio Equipment Buyer's Guide: Treadmills, Bikes, Rowers, and Air Bikes
item.description: Which cardio machine fits your goals, space, and budget — with honest assessments of calorie accuracy and long-term use patterns.

item.title: Home Gym Setup Guide: Equipment That Fits Any Space and Budget
item.description: Building a home gym by budget tier: $100 starter, $500 intermediate, $2000 full setup — with priority order for each.

item.title: Progressive Overload Tracking: Logs, Apps, and Spreadsheets That Work
item.description: Why progressive overload is the only driver of long-term strength gains, and how to track it simply enough that you actually do it.

item.title: Fit Simplify Resistance Loop Exercise Bands Set of 5
item.description: Resistance loop bands for glute activation, rehab, and assisted pull-ups: tension ratings, durability, and which set to buy.

item.title: TRX All-in-One Suspension Training System Home Gym
item.description: TRX suspension training: what movements it replaces, which muscles it actually trains, and the anchor options for home use.

item.title: Manduka PRO Yoga Mat 71' 6mm Dense Cushioning
item.description: Manduka PRO at $120: how its 6mm closed-cell foam compares to budget mats, grip in sweaty conditions, and whether the lifetime guarantee matters.

item.title: Garmin Forerunner 245 GPS Running Smartwatch with Advanced Dynamics
item.description: Garmin 245 vs Forerunner 55 vs Apple Watch: GPS accuracy, training load metrics, and battery life for serious runners.

item.title: Bowflex SelectTech 552 Adjustable Dumbbells (Pair)
item.description: Bowflex 552 vs fixed dumbbell sets: adjustment speed, weight range, durability after 3 years, and who they are and are not for.

item.title: A practical cable-machines gift guide
item.description: A practical, buyer-focused guide to comparing cable-machines options for gymledger.app.
